problem_statement: Fix the null-pointer crash when filtering an empty queryset.
patch:
diff --git a/orm.py b/orm.py
@@
-    return qs.filter()
+    return qs.filter() if qs else []
test_patch:
diff --git a/test_orm.py b/test_orm.py
@@
+def test_empty(): assert filter_empty() == []
hints_text: The crash happens in orm.filter when the queryset is None.

problem_statement: Add an index hint to the same ORM filter path.
test_patch:
diff --git a/test_orm.py b/test_orm.py
@@
+def test_index(): assert uses_index()

context.content: Earlier in this group we guarded the queryset against None in orm.filter.
